name: Christmas Lebkuchen
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter over low heat.
2. Stir the melted butter into the sugar, spices, chopped almonds, and beaten eggs and yolks.
3. Gradually add flour to the mixture, mixing in pre-mixed baking powder with flour first.
4. Roll out dough thinly.
5. Cut into desired shapes.
6. Place half of one almond in the center of each cookie.
7. Brush top of each cookie with egg white.
8. Bake in a moderate oven (350F) until brown.
